ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "household_income" TEXT /* Household income range of the respondent */,
  "us_region" TEXT /* US region where the respondent resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the respondent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the respondent's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the respondent's record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the respondent is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_us_region FOREIGN KEY ("us_region") REFERENCES us_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_household_income FOREIGN KEY ("household_income") REFERENCES income_ranges ("income_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_age_range FOREIGN KEY ("age_range") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_checking_habits" (
  "respondent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "checks_weather" TEXT /* Whether the respondent checks the weather daily */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used to check the weather */,
  "specific_app_or_website" TEXT /* Specific website or app used for weather checking (if applicable) */,
  "frequency_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of times the respondent checks the weather daily */,
  "preferred_time" TEXT /* Preferred time of day for checking the weather */,
  "weather_interest" TEXT /* Specific weather interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_checking_habits_check_method FOREIGN KEY ("check_method") REFERENCES check_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smartwatch_preferences" (
  "respondent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "smartwatch_likelihood" TEXT /* Likelihood of using a smartwatch for weather checking */,
  "preferred_watch_features" TEXT /* Specific features the respondent is interested in */,
  "budget_range" TEXT /* Budget range for the smartwatch */,
  "purchase_intent" TEXT /* Intent to purchase the smartwatch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smartwatch_preferences_smartwatch_likelihood FOREIGN KEY ("smartwatch_likelihood") REFERENCES smartwatch_likelihoods ("likelihood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "respondent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the respondent */,
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the detailed response data */,
  "response_method" TEXT /* Method used to submit the response */,
  "response_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey response to track changes over time */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the survey is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_ranges" (
  "income_range_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each income range */,
  "income_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "us_regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each US region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the US region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_methods" (
  "method_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each check method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the check method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smartwatch_likelihoods" (
  "likelihood_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each likelihood */,
  "likelihood_name" TEXT /* Name of the likelihood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("likelihood_id")
)
